pending.body: finding_summary: Nearby-work detail refresh silently discards every `br show` failure and then renders from stale summary/relation data as if the refresh succeeded, which can reintroduce closed/deferred beads or outdated titles/descriptions into `Nearby work`. `src/cli/project.rs:2133-2156` converts each `load_bead_detail` error to `None`, while `src/cli/project.rs:2776-2837` and `src/cli/project.rs:3171-3203` fall back to summary/relation status whenever detail is missing. affected_files: `src/cli/project.rs:2133-2156`, `src/cli/project.rs:2776-2837`, `src/cli/project.rs:3171-3203`. remediation_hint: propagate nearby detail-load failures, or conservatively omit entries whose authoritative detail could not be loaded instead of silently trusting stale summary data.

finding_summary: Nearby-work hydration now fans out one unbounded `br show` call per direct dependency/dependent before any production cap is applied, so highly connected beads can spawn dozens or hundreds of subprocesses during project creation. `src/cli/project.rs:1875-1886` feeds all IDs from `nearby_all_direct_relation_detail_candidate_ids`, `src/cli/project.rs:3076-3090` has no runtime limit, and `src/cli/project.rs:2133-2150` launches them all concurrently via `FuturesUnordered`. affected_files: `src/cli/project.rs:1875-1886`, `src/cli/project.rs:2133-2150`, `src/cli/project.rs:3076-3090`. remediation_hint: enforce a real runtime cap and/or semaphore around per-bead detail fetches, and prefer summary data for noncritical candidates.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 14 -> Plan and Implement
